title: Dental Clinic in Prabhadevi Mumbai - Enamel Dental Specialities
heading: Expert Dental Care Clinic in Prabhadevi, Mumbai
description: Enamel Dental Specialities is a trusted dental clinic in Prabhadevi Dadar Mumbai with expert dentists for root canal, implants & cosmetic care. Book today.
text:
Dental Clinic in Prabhadevi Mumbai - Enamel Dental Specialities 022 2432 4556 +91 98698 50603 enameldentals@gmail.com Home About Us Our Team Testimonial Our Services Root Canal Treatment Cosmetic Dentistry Modern Dentistry Dental Implants Orthodontic Dentistry Pediatric Dentistry General Dentistry Gallery Blog Contact Us Book An Appointment Specialist Dental Care in Prabhadevi Get advanced dental treatments from experienced specialists, trusted through decades of expert care and 500+ 5-star verified patient reviews. From routine care to complex procedures, we prioritise your comfort and long-term oral health at every step. Book a Consultation Meet our Experts Your Confident Smile Starts Here Join 4000+ happy patients who trust our internationally trained and specialist-certified team of experts. We deliver beautiful, precision-driven results through personalised treatment plans and care that puts patients first, always. Book a Consultation Meet our Experts 40+ Years of Combined Clinical Experience 4000+ Happy Smiles Transformed 25+ Specialised Treatments 5.0 Rating on Practo (550+ patient stories) Expert Dental Care Clinic in Prabhadevi, Mumbai Are you looking for a dental clinic in Prabhadevi where care feels considered, not rushed? At Enamel Dental Specialities, we provide specialist-led care, transparent treatment planning, and a calm, cutting-edge environment that puts you completely at ease. Our philosophy focuses on 'preventive dentistry' by utilising advanced techniques to save your natural teeth whenever possible. Our team of specialist dentists offers everything from preventive check-ups to complex restorative and cosmetic treatments tailored to meet your unique dental goals.Every treatment is clearly explained, carefully planned, and delivered with your comfort in mind. Global Expertise, Local Care Multi-disciplinary specialists with international training (UCLA, France) and 4+ decades of collective experience in cosmetic, restorative, orthodontic, and preventive dentistry. Appointment-Based Care Flexible weekday and Saturday scheduling with minimal waiting time to fit your busy life. Conveniently Located Just a 2-minute walk from Siddhivinayak Temple and the metro station, offering easy access for local residents, commuters, and families across Dadar and nearby areas. Schedule Your Visit Contact Our Team About Us Most visits to the dentist in Prabhadevi begin with a chair and a checklist. Ours began many years ago with a different vision: that world-class dentistry should feel personal, transparent, and deeply rooted in expertise. That belief was shaped by years of academic leadership and teaching under the philosophy of our founder, Dr Sharad Kokate, an endodontist and former dean of Y.M.T. Dental College and Hospital. It’s where our emphasis on clinical discipline, ethical decision-making, and evidence-based care took root. Read More Specialities Comprehensive Dental Care Services Your teeth affect how you eat, speak, and feel every day. At Enamel Dental Specialities, we provide comprehensive care powered by the latest technology to deliver long-lasting, beautiful results. Root Canal Treatment Our specialist-led root canal treatments are performed with extreme accuracy to resolve infection and eliminate pain, focusing on long-term tooth preservation and patient comfort. Read More Cosmetic Dentistry Our thoughtfully planned cosmetic dentistry treatments will not only enhance your smile but also preserve your natural facial harmony and comfort. The end result is a radiant smile that is uniquely yours. Read More Modern Dentistry Our advanced technological infrastructure helps reduce uncertainty, improve accuracy, and make every visit feel calmer. Read More Orthodontic Dentistry We provide advanced orthodontic treatments for children, teens, and adults that are designed to improve bite function and long-term dental stability. Read More Paediatric Dentistry Our specialists provide gentle, child-friendly care focused on comfort and early prevention. Our paediatric care is designed to foster positive habits in your child through calm and reassuring dental experiences. Read More General Dentistry We offer comprehensive general dental care covering check-ups, cleanings, and essential treatments to keep your smile healthy. Read More Meet Our Experienced Dentists in Prabhadevi ❮ Dr. Arnie Panchamia Kokate Aesthetic & Cosmetic Dentistry (USA) Dr. Arnie Panchamia Kokate believes that a beautiful smile can boost your confidence & bring positivity in life. She specializes in Aesthetic & Cosmetic Dentistry & has completed her PG Diploma in Aesthetic Dentistry from UCLA, Los Angeles, USA. She strives to achieve good oral health for her patients, along with giving them a perfect smile. Dr. Aditya Kokate Prosthodontist Dr Aditya Kokate is Prosthodontist, specializing in crowns & veneers, full mouth rehabilitation and dental implants. He has post – graduate diploma (P.G.D) in dental implantology from CIIOMFI, France. He is a member of the Indian Prosthodontic Society (IPS) and the Indian Society of Oral Implantology (ISOI). Dr. Sharad Kokate Endodontist Dr Sharad Kokate is an Endodontist with over 35 years of clinical & academic experience. He has been exclusively performing root canal treatments and has an expertise in handling complicated re-root canal cases with emphasis on “saving the natural tooth”. He is the ex-DEAN of Y.M.T. Dental College & Hospital, where he was also the Head of Department and a guide to many postgraduate students. ❯ Book An Appointment First Name* Last Name* Phone Number* Email* Services* —Please choose an option— Root Canal Treatment Cosmetic Dentistry Modern Dentistry Orthodontic Dentistry Pediatric Dentistry General Dentistry Dental Implants Message Send Your Message Our Contact Get In Touch We thank you for allowing us to take care of your dental needs and look forward to serving you. Make an appointment today. Reviews Hear what our happy patients have to say about their journey with Enamel Dental N Nehal Karia ★★★★★ I had a really comfortable and efficient experience with Dr. Arnie. She examined thoroughly, explained the issues patiently, discussed treatment plans in detail and continuously kept me in the loop, all the while assuring that I am comfortable. During the treatment also, she was calm but thorough, making me feel confident and at ease. I would highly recommend her. She is a rare combination of efficiency and patience and takes utmost care to keep the patient comfortable at all times. Read More M Mandar Karkhanis ★★★★★ Had a really great experience here. The dentist did an excellent job with almost no pain—very skilled and professional. The team was courteous, followed up on time, and handled everything smoothly. Really appreciate how understanding and accommodating they were, even with a couple of reschedules. Highly recommend! Read More D Divya Gianani ★★★★★ I had gone for a teeth whitening appointment, however as I had veneers, hence the doctor recommended a more appropriate treatment and was very patient in explaining everything and answering my questions. M Leena Koticha ★★★★★ A big thank-you to Dr Sharad, Dr Aditya & Dr Arnie for the world class treatment. Always appreciate your expertise, modern setup, and the cheerful, well-organized atmosphere. The staff are very friendly & equally smiling too. In these days very rare to find dentists who are so skilled and so punctual! Visiting the clinic is always a pleasant experience. 🙌😃 Read More M Uchita Patel ★★★★★ I recently visited Enamel Dental Specialities for a treatment, and I was impressed with the entire experience. The facilities were modern and well-maintained, and the staff were friendly and efficient. I was particularly impressed by Dr Arnie's expertise and care. She took the time to explain everything in detail, answered all my questions, and made sure I was comfortable throughout the treatment. I'd highly recommend Enamel Dental specialities to anyone looking for top-notch dental care. Their dedication to their patients' comfort and well-being is truly exceptional. Read More M Mansi Thakkar ★★★★★ It’s a very professional clinic with a team of doctors who are extremely helpful and knowledgeable in addressing dental issues. I’ve had several dental concerns over the years, and they’ve all been resolved with excellent care and impressive cosmetic results. Read More M Shalin Sameer Koticha ★★★★★ Dr. Arnie and Aditya Kokate are both extremely skillful, caring and friendly. I've been visiting the clinic since 6 years now and they've helped me with cavities, root canals, caps and extractions along with general check ups and maintenance. Happy to have found a clinic I can trust. M Sumathi Bandepalli ★★★★★ I have been a patient of Dr Aditya Kokate at his clinic Enamel Dental Care for the last 10 years. I have always had wonderful experience here. Recently had an implant surgery and from the moment I walked in, the staff were warm, welcoming, and extremely professional. The clinic is clean, modern, and thoughtfully designed to make patients feel comfortable and at ease. Dr. Aditya Kokate is not only highly skilled and knowledgeable, but also incredibly gentle and reassuring. The doctor took the time to explain every step of the procedure and answered all my questions patiently, which really put me at ease. The entire process was smooth and pain-free. My whole family goes to this clinic for all our dental issues.

It’s clear that this clinic prioritizes both patient care and clinical excellence. I highly recommend Dr. Aditya Kokate to anyone looking for exceptional dental care in a friendly, supportive environment. Read More » See All Blogs Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) What should I expect on my first visit to your dental clinic in Prabhadevi? Our leading dentists in Prabhadevi will provide you with a full dental check-up, detailed digital diagnostics, a consultation to discuss your concerns, and personalised advice based on your oral health needs. What treatments are offered at your dental clinic? As one of the best dental clinics in Prabhadevi, we offer general, cosmetic, orthodontic, paediatric, endodontic (root canal), and advanced prosthodontic (implants and veneers) treatments under one roof. Do you offer emergency dental care? While our clinic follows an appointment-based schedule, if you're dealing with sudden dental discomfort or injury, get in touch with our team to understand your earliest care options. How can I make an appointment? Get in touch with our team by submitting a message through the contact form, by phone at +91 98698 50603 or 022 2432 4556 , or by email at enameldentals@gmail.com. What kinds of payment options or financial plans are available at dental clinics? We accept all major payment methods at our clinic. Flexible payment plans can be made available on a case-by-case basis to ensure accessible, top-notch dental care for every patient. At enamel dental specialities, it is our endeavour to provide world
          class personalised dental care at affordable cost; at the same time
          building a relationship of trust.
